title: huperzia flexibilis
intro: Huperzia flexibilis, also known as the creeping lycopodium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). It is native to China, Japan, and the Himalayas, and its medicinal properties have been utilized in traditional medicine for centuries. Huperzia flexibilis has been found to have neuroprotective and antioxidant effects, which have been linked to potential health benefits such as improved cognitive function and reduced risk of neurodegenerative diseases like Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal supplement, available in capsule or tablet form, and can also be used in traditional tea or infusion preparations.
